title: Cobblemon Tools
description: this datapack add tools based on cobblemon
body:
This data pack adds tools with cobblemon theme, requires to be placed in 2 folders

minecraft/resource packs

minecraft/saves/world/datapacks

The added tools are as follows.
- aegislash shield:unbreakable 4
- honedge sword diamond: knockback 4
- honedge sword netherite: knockback 4, unbreakable 4
- Diamond Krabby Shovel: Efficiency 4
- Netherite Krabby Shovel: Efficiency 4, Unbreakable 4
- Kleavor Diamond Axe: Sharpness 6
- Kleavor Netherite Axe: Sharpess 6, Unbreakable 4
- tinkaton diamond pickaxe: efficiency 4
- Tinkaton Netherite pikcaxe: Efficiency 4, Fortune 4.


In the following images you can see the crafts.
